task_completion.description: CMS Page titled 'Coming Soon' with URL Key 'coming-soon' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a CMS page in the Magento Admin (Content > Pages) with the Title 'Coming Soon' and URL Key 'coming-soon'. This can be seen in the Pages data grid or the page edit form (under Search Engine Optimization for the URL key).

task_completion.description: The content of the CMS Page contains the required HTML.
task_completion.visual_evidence:
Look for the exact text '

We are launching soon!

Stay tuned for our grand opening.

' in the Content editor of the 'Coming Soon' CMS page.

task_completion.description: The 'Coming Soon' CMS Page is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Enable Page' toggle set to 'Yes' on the 'Coming Soon' page edit screen, or a status of 'Enabled' / 'Active' in the Pages grid.

task_completion.description: The Default Web URL (CMS Home Page) is set to the 'Coming Soon' page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Magento Configuration page (Stores > Configuration > General > Web > Default Pages) where the 'CMS Home Page' dropdown is set to 'Coming Soon'.

task_completion.description: The 'Display Demo Store Notice' is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Magento Configuration page (Stores > Configuration > General > Design > HTML Head) where the 'Display Demo Store Notice' dropdown is set to 'Yes'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Magento Admin web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent navigated the Magento Admin panel in a web browser, rather than running CLI commands like `bin/magento config:set` in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the screenshots show a real web browser interacting with the Magento Admin panel, not a text editor or mocked interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent did not use a database client (like MySQL CLI or phpMyAdmin) to directly insert values into the `core_config_data` or `cms_page` tables.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
The expected CMS page identifier is 'coming-soon', title is 'Coming Soon', and the content must include '

We are launching soon!

'. The CMS Home Page is configured via 'web/default/cms_home_page' and the Demo Store Notice via 'design/head/demonotice'. In the Magento Admin GUI, the CMS Home Page is found under Stores > Configuration > General > Web > Default Pages, and the Demo Store Notice is under Stores > Configuration > General > Design > HTML Head.
